full_text:
Fa Miao 法邈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fa Miao (法邈)was born in Youfufeng. Served Shu. Son of Fa Zheng. Fa Miao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
